heading: Cooperation and coordination
label: 6855 Cooperation and coordination
notes: Amendments2025—Subsec. (b). substituted “shall” for “may” and “the Secretaries” for “the Secretary of the Interior”.Pub. L. 118–234
amendments: Amendments2025—Subsec. (b). substituted “shall” for “may” and “the Secretaries” for “the Secretary of the Interior”.Pub. L. 118–234

children.heading: Third-party providers
children.label: a Third-party providers
children.text: The Secretaries may enter into an agreement with a third party to carry out any provision of this chapter.

children.heading: US Geological Survey
children.label: b US Geological Survey
children.text: The Secretaries shall work with the Director of the United States Geological Survey to collect, aggregate, digitize, standardize, or publish data on behalf of the Secretaries to meet the requirements of this chapter.
